rationale: Educ. Code §33.258 governs a council's duties regarding expanded learning opportunities. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: Sec. 33.258. POWERS AND DUTIES. (a) The council shall:
